violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Call for service made by Owner at the time of inspection. Per technician, unit is to be serviced next morning. Per the PIC, will send confirmation of repair to inspector. PIC to ensure all bar glasses/equipment are properly sanitized at the kitchen dish machine until bar dish washer is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The hot hold door gasket was observed in poor repair. Per the PIC, currently trying to find a replacement gasket for the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2026

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair/adjustment/replacement: - Ceiling tile over the cookline area was observed sagging and not fully held in place - Floor to wall juncture tiles near the mop sink area were observed cracked/loosely attached - Floor tiles in the bar area were observed cracked/chipped - The exterior double door to the bowling alley side dry storage room is separating at the lower hinge area and in need of repair Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

A ceiling tile and ceiling light fixture in the cookline area was observed to have an accumulation of dust/debris. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener moved to the dish area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Working containers are to be properly labeled and easily identifiable. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

A chemical spray bottle was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items at the cook line area. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemical was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, sausage and shredded potatoes were placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic wrap covered containers greater than four inches deep. Items were placed in shallow containers and left uncovered for rapid cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Reduced Oxygen Packaged Imitation Crab Meat was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH/Seafood that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Packaging was sliced open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

At the time of inspection, a stack of clean buckets, per the PIC, used for transportation of ice, were observed stacked and stored in front of/under the hand washing sink in the back dish/prep area. Buckets are to be stored in a way to prevent possible contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

At the time of inspection, scoops were observed stored in dry ingredients with the handles touching the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoops were adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (Currently an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
